system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Chen Smith. I need help right away—I accidentally cancelled my order and I need to undo that cancellation. I really need all the items delivered as soon as possible. Can you please reverse the cancellation and make sure my order gets shipped out? I’m in a rush, so I’d appreciate it if you could do this quickly.

Thank you for reaching out, Chen. I understand this is urgent. For security, I need to verify your identity before I can access your order details.

Could you please provide either:
- The email address associated with your account, or
- Your zip code

Once verified, I’ll check your order status and assist you further.

Sure, my zip code is 32278. I don’t remember my email address offhand, but I really need this sorted out quickly. Can you please check my order and undo the cancellation? I need everything from the original order delivered as soon as possible.

Thank you, Chen. To locate your account, I’ll also need your first and last name as registered. Could you please confirm your full name as it appears on your account? Once I have that, I’ll look up your order and assist you right away.
Yes, my full name is Chen Smith. That’s what’s on my account. Please check my order and undo the cancellation—I really need all the items delivered as soon as possible.

Thank you for confirming your name and zip code. It appears there was a technical issue while trying to access your account. Let me try again to retrieve your information so I can assist you with your order. 

Thank you for your patience.

I'm currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your account information. Because of this, I'm unable to access your order or attempt to reverse the cancellation at this moment.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and resolve this as quickly as possible. Please hold on.

arguments.summary: User Chen Smith accidentally cancelled their order and urgently needs the cancellation reversed so all items can be delivered. Unable to retrieve user info due to technical error. Needs immediate assistance.

messages.content: I'm unable to access your account due to a technical issue, and I cannot resolve your request at this time. Please contact our customer service directly or try again shortly. I apologize for the inconvenience.

I really need this fixed right now—can’t you escalate this or find another way to help me? I’m in a hurry and I need my order reinstated and delivered as soon as possible. Is there anyone else you can connect me with, or any other way to get this sorted out immediately? I don’t want to lose my order just because of a technical issue.

Thank you for your patience, Chen. I understand how urgent this is. Due to a technical issue, I’m unable to access your account or process your request directly. However, your situation is important, and I will escalate this to a human agent who can assist you immediately.

Please hold on while I transfer you to a human agent for urgent assistance. YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

arguments.summary: User Chen Smith accidentally cancelled their order and urgently needs the cancellation reversed so all items can be delivered. Unable to retrieve user info due to technical error. Needs immediate assistance.

final_response:
Thank you for your patience, Chen. I understand how urgent this is. Due to a technical issue, I’m unable to access your account or process your request directly. However, your situation is important, and I will escalate this to a human agent who can assist you immediately.

Please hold on while I transfer you to a human agent for urgent assistance. YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
